translation.name: King James Version with Apocrypha
translation.attribution: Based on the 1769 King James Version text, including the Apocrypha.

books.name: Genesis
books.description: Creation, humanity's beginnings, and the family of Abraham.

books.name: Exodus
books.description: Israel's deliverance from Egypt and covenant at Sinai.

books.name: Leviticus
books.description: Laws for worship, sacrifice, priesthood, and holy living.

books.name: Numbers
books.description: Israel's wilderness journey, rebellions, and preparation for Canaan.

books.name: Deuteronomy
books.description: Moses' final speeches renewing Israel's covenant.

books.name: Joshua
books.description: Israel enters Canaan and apportions the land.

books.name: Judges
books.description: Cycles of rebellion, oppression, deliverance, and disorder.

books.name: Ruth
books.description: A Moabite widow finds loyalty, redemption, and a new family.

books.name: I Samuel
books.description: Samuel's ministry and the rise and fall of Saul.

books.name: II Samuel
books.description: David's reign, victories, failures, and family troubles.

books.name: I Kings
books.description: Solomon's reign, the temple, and the kingdom's division.

books.name: II Kings
books.description: The divided kingdoms decline and fall into exile.

books.name: I Chronicles
books.description: Genealogies and David's reign, centered on worship.

books.name: II Chronicles
books.description: Solomon and Judah's kings, from temple to exile.

books.name: Ezra
books.description: Exiles return and restore the temple and covenant.

books.name: Nehemiah
books.description: Jerusalem's walls are rebuilt and its community renewed.

books.name: Esther
books.description: A Jewish queen courageously prevents her people's destruction.

books.name: Job
books.description: A righteous sufferer wrestles with loss, justice, and God.

books.name: Psalms
books.description: Songs and prayers of worship, lament, trust, and praise.

books.name: Proverbs
books.description: Practical wisdom for faithful and discerning living.

books.name: Ecclesiastes
books.description: A search for meaning amid life's passing pursuits.

books.name: Song of Solomon
books.description: Poetry celebrating love, desire, and mutual devotion.

books.name: Isaiah
books.description: Judgment, hope, restoration, and God's promised salvation.

books.name: Jeremiah
books.description: Warnings before Jerusalem's fall and promises of renewal.

books.name: Lamentations
books.description: Poems mourning Jerusalem's destruction while seeking mercy.

books.name: Ezekiel
books.description: Visions of judgment, God's presence, and Israel's restoration.

books.name: Daniel
books.description: Faithfulness in exile and visions of God's enduring kingdom.

books.name: Hosea
books.description: A troubled marriage portrays Israel's unfaithfulness and God's love.

books.name: Joel
books.description: A devastating plague prompts repentance and hope.

books.name: Amos
books.description: A call for justice amid prosperity and religious hypocrisy.

books.name: Obadiah
books.description: Judgment against Edom and hope for Zion.

books.name: Jonah
books.description: A reluctant prophet encounters God's mercy toward Nineveh.

books.name: Micah
books.description: Judgment on injustice and hope for a restored ruler.

books.name: Nahum
books.description: A prophecy announcing the fall of oppressive Nineveh.

books.name: Habakkuk
books.description: A prophet questions injustice and learns faithful trust.

books.name: Zephaniah
books.description: The day of the Lord brings judgment and restoration.

books.name: Haggai
books.description: A call to rebuild the temple after exile.

books.name: Zechariah
books.description: Visions encourage restoration, repentance, and future hope.

books.name: Malachi
books.description: A call to faithful worship and covenant living.

books.name: I Esdras
books.description: A retelling of restoration history from Josiah to Ezra.

books.name: II Esdras
books.description: Apocalyptic visions exploring justice, suffering, and restoration.

books.name: Tobit
books.description: A faithful family finds healing and guidance through Raphael.

books.name: Judith
books.description: A courageous widow delivers her people from invasion.

books.name: Additions to Esther
books.description: Prayers, visions, and decrees expanding Esther's story.

books.name: Wisdom
books.description: Reflections on wisdom, righteousness, immortality, and divine justice.

books.name: Sirach
books.description: Practical wisdom for faithful, disciplined, and ethical living.

books.name: Baruch
books.description: Confession, wisdom, consolation, and a warning against idolatry.

books.name: Prayer of Azariah
books.description: Repentance and praise offered from the fiery furnace.

books.name: Susanna
books.description: Daniel exposes false witnesses and vindicates Susanna.

books.name: Bel and the Dragon
books.description: Daniel exposes false gods and defeats a dragon.

books.name: Prayer of Manasses
books.description: A penitential prayer attributed to King Manasseh.

books.name: I Maccabees
books.description: The Jewish revolt and rise of the Hasmonean rulers.

books.name: II Maccabees
books.description: Persecution, resistance, martyrdom, and the temple's restoration.

books.name: Matthew
books.description: Jesus the Messiah teaches, heals, dies, and rises.

books.name: Mark
books.description: A fast-moving account of Jesus' ministry, death, and resurrection.

books.name: Luke
books.description: An orderly account of Jesus' compassionate ministry and salvation.

books.name: John
books.description: Signs and teachings reveal Jesus as the Son of God.

books.name: Acts
books.description: The Holy Spirit empowers the church's expanding witness.

books.name: Romans
books.description: Paul explains the gospel, faith, grace, and transformed living.

books.name: I Corinthians
books.description: Paul addresses division, worship, love, and resurrection.

books.name: II Corinthians
books.description: Paul defends his ministry and teaches generous service.

books.name: Galatians
books.description: Freedom and justification by faith, not works of the law.

books.name: Ephesians
books.description: Unity in Christ and the church's new way of life.

books.name: Philippians
books.description: Joy, humility, perseverance, and partnership in Christ.

books.name: Colossians
books.description: Christ's supremacy and the transformed life of believers.

books.name: I Thessalonians
books.description: Encouragement in faith, holiness, and Christ's return.

books.name: II Thessalonians
books.description: Perseverance and clarification about the day of the Lord.

books.name: I Timothy
books.description: Guidance for church leadership, teaching, and conduct.

books.name: II Timothy
books.description: A final charge to endure and faithfully proclaim the gospel.

books.name: Titus
books.description: Sound teaching, good works, and orderly church leadership.

books.name: Philemon
books.description: Paul appeals for reconciliation with Onesimus as a brother.

books.name: Hebrews
books.description: Christ's supremacy and a call to enduring faith.

books.name: James
books.description: Practical wisdom for a living and steadfast faith.

books.name: I Peter
books.description: Hope and holy living amid suffering.

books.name: II Peter
books.description: Growth in faith and warnings against false teaching.

books.name: I John
books.description: Assurance through truth, obedience, faith, and love.

books.name: II John
books.description: A brief call to truth, love, and discernment.

books.name: III John
books.description: Hospitality and faithfulness amid conflict in the church.

books.name: Jude
books.description: An appeal to defend the faith against corrupt teachers.

books.name: Revelation of John
books.description: Apocalyptic visions of judgment, perseverance, and new creation.
